settings.layerSaveError: The following layers have incomplete data source configuration
settings.noDataOrigins: No data origins yet. Add one below.
settings.geometryFieldTooltip:
Name of the field inside each array item that holds the WKB position value.

Requires **Response path** to point to the array first. Once set, use `{{data.field}}` to access the field on each item.

**Example:** with *Response path* = `data` and this field = `{{data.location}}`, it will read `location` from each item in the array.
settings.latFieldTooltip:
Name of the field in your data that holds the latitude (north-south position) of each point — a number between −90 and 90.

**Example:** if your data has `{ "lat": 40.71, "lng": -74.00 }`, type `lat`.

*Also accepts `{{variable}}` for dynamic values.*
settings.lngFieldTooltip:
Name of the field in your data that holds the longitude (east-west position) of each point — a number between −180 and 180.

**Example:** if your data has `{ "lat": 40.71, "lng": -74.00 }`, type `lng`.

*Also accepts `{{variable}}` for dynamic values.*
settings.responsePathTooltip:
If your data list is wrapped inside a container in the response, type the name of that container here.

**Example:** if the response is `{ "example": [ ... ] }`, type `example`.

If it is nested inside multiple levels, separate them with dots: `level1.level2`.

Leave empty if the response is directly the array.
settings.accessControlDescription: Manage who can view and edit this dashboard

VENCIDO.label: Overdue

EN_TALLER.label: In workshop

AGENDADO.label: Scheduled

SIN_INFO.label: No data

SUBUTILIZADO.label: {pct} – underused
